scope: Default-preserving event transport; no instrument controls or sound changes.

metric.statistic: RMS difference of deterministic signed-mean and RMS block fingerprints, normalized by baseline fingerprint RMS with a 1e-12 denominator floor

candidate_policy: Every candidate cell must retain the exact interleaved Float32 PCM digest; the frozen numerical drift threshold additionally diagnoses repeatability and rejects committed gain/timing mutations.
phase_a_real_path_gate: The Phase A candidate must adapt this frozen event corpus through both actual paths: AudioContext.currentTime plus postMessage plus AudioWorklet plus ij_queue_event, and OfflineAudioContext processorOptions plus AudioWorklet plus ij_queue_event. Browser callback coverage is 128 frames; the direct ring harness owns the declared 1/17/64/127/128 chunk matrix. The Phase A implementation may add candidate adapters and browser assertions but may not edit any frozen path.
